audio_log: So we are doing the circuit very quickly.
So, go to the switch, main power on.
This is a good way of doing it. Now we are going to do the inspection.
Open the front door panel of the circuit brick.
Look for any damaged parts in there.
Is that one on? OK. I can take it out.
I putted it on the table next to me.
You've got to pick up the... Yeah, I'm going to...
Lift the lid. Open it up.
You can get the similar part from the box.
Let the new component into the socket.
Press the reset button on the left side of the circuit breaker.
Reset everything. Turn off the light.
Clicking on the basic button. The next step is...
Switch off of the main power. The power off.
Put it back in the toolbox.
